body:
## Updates:
- Synced translations from the [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- Added support for loading native library plugins, plugin repository: [NativeLibPlugin](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/NativeLibPlugin/releases)
- Controls: added support for using a stylus to interact with the game view

## Changes:
- Modpack installation: users can now cancel when entering the version name

## Refactors:
- Rewrote the account management screen using Hilt and MVI architecture. by [youfeng](https://github.com/youfeng11)

## Fixes:
- LWJGL: fixed inability to interact with Axiom mod GUI (imgui-java)
- Fixed path formatting issues in the in-game file browser
- Background: reduced frequent launcher background reloads
- Resolution: fully fixed mouse offset issues on some devices
